method: source review of main@4016a1a + read-only production probes + git history review; no production mutations

findings.title: Secrets persist in git history (handoff .docx with PAT+JWT); engagement PAT re-exposed in chat
findings.current_code: commit 6429c1c adds docs/admin/SHASHKI_ROYALE_ADMIN_HANDOFF.docx (deleted in HEAD, reachable in history)
findings.evidence: git show 6429c1c --stat shows the docx; masked blob scan found 1x ghp_ PAT + 1x JWT
findings.attack_scenario: Anyone with repo read (or a future leak) recovers historical tokens; service-role grants full DB control bypassing RLS
findings.affected_data: All Supabase data, GitHub repo, Cloudflare project
findings.business_impact: Full compromise of game economy + PII
findings.technical_impact: RLS bypass, code push, infra control
findings.why_insufficient: History rewrite not performed; tokens recoverable; one PAT additionally pasted in chat
findings.immediate_containment: Revoke ghp_ PAT, JWT-shaped key, chat-pasted PAT; rotate service-role/JWT_SECRET/admin password hash
findings.long_term_fix: git filter-repo purge; enable secret scanning + push protection; secrets only via Cloudflare/GitHub secret stores
findings.acceptance_criteria: Tokens revoked; history clean; scanning enabled; preview/prod still functional with new secrets
findings.verification_method: GitHub token list shows revoked; secret-scan clean; redeploy works

findings.title: Raw profiles table is anon-readable (player_id, auth_user_id, email columns)
findings.current_code: RLS policy permits anon SELECT * on public.profiles
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/profiles?select=* as anon -> 200 with player_id/auth_user_id/email columns
findings.attack_scenario: Anonymous enumeration of identity mapping; future email population leaks PII
findings.technical_impact: Identity map exposure; underpins insecure realtime
findings.existing_controls: public_profiles view exists for safe reads
findings.why_insufficient: Raw table still selectable by anon
findings.long_term_fix: Restrict profiles RLS to self+service; public consumption via public_profiles only
findings.dependencies: Confirm guest game flow uses auth.uid()
findings.regression_risk: HIGH if guest play reads profiles via anon — staged verify + rollback mandatory
findings.acceptance_criteria: anon SELECT profiles -> 0 rows; game still playable for guests+auth
findings.verification_method: anon probe returns []; game smoke on staging

findings.title: Insecure realtime: admin browser subscribes to public tables via anon key
findings.evidence: Code review + anon readability of games/moves/profiles/game_stakes
findings.reproduction: Open admin; observe wss to supabase with anon key; private domains never arrive
findings.attack_scenario: Anon clients can subscribe to the same public tables; privileged domains cannot stream at all
findings.business_impact: Cannot build a trustworthy ops centre; data correctness/staleness
findings.technical_impact: No event contract/dedup/ordering/auth; duplicate subs; RLS is the only control
findings.existing_controls: RLS hides wallets/audit (so those simply don't stream)
findings.why_insufficient: Security depends on RLS breadth; violates 'no unauthorized subscription' SLO
findings.long_term_fix: Cloudflare authenticated SSE gateway (ADR Option C) + new client
findings.acceptance_criteria: Browser no longer holds anon realtime to private data; all 6 domains stream via authn gateway; anon cannot open stream

findings.title: game_stakes fully anon-readable (economy data exposure)
findings.current_code: RLS permits anon SELECT * on game_stakes
findings.evidence: GET /rest/v1/game_stakes?select=* anon -> 200 full rows (entry_fee, pot, profile ids, escrow/payout)
findings.attack_scenario: Public reads of economy activity and player pairings
findings.long_term_fix: RLS to participants+service; sanitized view if needed client-side
findings.acceptance_criteria: anon SELECT game_stakes -> 0 rows; game still functions

findings.title: Login rate-limit fails open; CF hard cap unverified
findings.current_code: loginRateLimit catch{} returns ok:true; comment relies on assumed CF rule
findings.evidence: Code review; CF rule not externally verifiable
findings.reproduction: Induce Supabase error during login -> RL bypassed
findings.attack_scenario: Brute force during DB hiccup or if CF rule absent
findings.acceptance_criteria: Demonstrated hard cap on rapid bad logins

findings.title: No RBAC, single hardcoded owner role, no MFA, weak revocation
findings.current_code: jwtSign({role:'owner'}); admin_users table unused at login
findings.reproduction: Login always yields owner; no per-user disable
findings.attack_scenario: Disabled admin keeps cookie until exp; no least-privilege
findings.business_impact: Cannot scale to multiple admins safely
findings.long_term_fix: admin_users authoritative + roles + password_version + MFA/Cloudflare Access
findings.acceptance_criteria: Per-user disable revokes session; roles enforced

findings.title: Pages Function responses lack security headers
findings.evidence: /api/health lacks HSTS/CSP (public/_headers applies to static only)
findings.acceptance_criteria: /api/* responses carry HSTS + minimal CSP + nosniff

findings.title: access-control-allow-origin:* on static assets
findings.long_term_fix: Confirm Pages default; document; tighten if custom

findings.title: Audit writes can fail silently (catch{} swallow)
findings.evidence: audit() wrapped in try/catch with empty catch
findings.acceptance_criteria: Audit failure is observable; no silent loss

findings.title: Unbounded JS-side scans in read endpoints
Sensitive reads not audited / no correlation id on success
Logout does not invalidate token server-side
findings.evidence: logout clears cookie only; JWT valid until exp
findings.long_term_fix: short TTL+refresh or per-user token_version denylist

findings.title: CI not triggered on feat/** push
Preview deploy may inherit production write secrets
findings.long_term_fix: Scope preview env to read-only/test profile + separate ALLOWED_ORIGIN

findings.title: No kill-switch / read-only mode for admin writes
Full numeric ledger reconciliation not performed (service-role required)
findings.long_term_fix: Run diag_reconcile.sql after rotation; do not claim 'clean' until zero anomalies

findings.title: Game frontend lacks HSTS/CSP/XFO
findings.evidence: header capture: no HSTS/CSP/XFO on game site
findings.long_term_fix: Add _headers to game (separate PR, out of admin scope)

verified_closed: Anonymous admin RPC bypass (grant/refund/suspend/aggregates all 42501 to anon)
HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookie session; no token in body
PBKDF2 >=100k iters, salt>=16, byte-diff compare, dummy-hash timing flatten
UUID validation + amount caps + required idempotency keys
service-role absent from frontend bundle; strong CSP/HSTS/COOP/CORP on HTML
